class.name: aubo_driver/AuboRos2Wrapper
class.description:
ros2_control hardware interface for Aubo robots running the legacy firmware. Uses the old SDK (ServiceInterface / Tcp2CanbusMode) so no firmware upgrade is required. Communicates on port 8899 using two TCP connections (send + receive), streams joint positions via robotServiceSetRobotPosData2Canbus, and reads state via robotServiceGetCurrentWaypointInfo at ~500 Hz.
Required hardware parameter in the URDF ros2_control tag: robot_ip — IP address of the robot controller (e.g. 192.168.1.102)
